LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT COUNTY OF SAN JOAQUIN, DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ACTION IS TIME BARRED. PLAINTIFF FAILED TO FILE ITS COMPLAINT WITHIN TWO YEARS OF ACCURAL OF THE CAUSE OF ACTION, NOVEMBER 24, 2005. JANUARY 20, 2006 LETTER IS REQUEST FOR RECONSIDERATION OF THE EARLIER DENIAL OF CLAIM, CLEARLY INDICATING ACCURAL OF CAUSE OF ACTION FOR TWO YEAR LIMITATIONS PERIOD. GOVERNMENT CODE SECTIONS 945.6(A)(2) AND 901. (THE COURT ALSO ADDS THAT THE CORRECT DATE OF LETTER IS NOVEMBER 24, 2004, NOT NOVEMBER 24, 2005). JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT COUNTY OF SAN JOAQUIN, DEMURRER TO SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Robert O'Rourke, Esq., Deputy County Counsel, for San Joaquin County, (209) 468-2980, appearing for Defendant Health Plan of San Joaquin, and moving party; Leo Luevanos, Esq. of Stephenson, Acquisto and Colman, (818) 559-4477, appearing for Plaintiff, The Regents of the University of California; and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Demurrer sustained without leave to amend. Action is time barred. Plaintiff failed to file its complaint within two years of accural of the cause of action, November 24, 2005. January 20, 2006 letter is request for reconsideration of the earlier denial of claim, clearly indicating accural of cause of action for two year limitations period. Government Code sections 945.6(a)(2) and 901. (The Court also adds that the correct date of letter is November 24, 2004, not November 24, 2005). (302/CWW/XLT) Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-19-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT COUNTY OF SAN JOAQUIN'S, MOTION TO STRIKE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT. Appearances: Robert O'Rourke, Esq., Deputy County Counsel, for San Joaquin County, (209) 468-2980, appearing for Defendant Health Plan of San Joaquin, and moving party; Leo Luevanos, Esq. of Stephenson, Acquisto and Colman, (818) 559-4477, appearing for Plaintiff, The Regents of the University of California; Plaintiff has filed a notice of non-opposition to the motion to strike portions of the second Amended Complaint. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion to Strike is Granted. Prevailing party to prepare a form of order. (302/CWW/XLT) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Nov-20-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT HEALTH PLAN OF SAN JOAQUIN'S DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT.
APPEARANCES: Leo Luevanos, Esq. of Law Offices of Stephenson, Acquisto & Colman 925/734-6100 or 818/559-4477 for pltf & opposing party; Robert E. O'Rourke, Deputy County Counsel, Office of the County Counsel 209/468-2980 for deft & moving party.
RULING: Argued and the Court sustained the demurrer with leave to amend. Plaintiff has until 12/22/08 to amend. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/PJM/PB) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600
